calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sabrina Tseng, via ZOOM, for Ruthann Cohn, Administrator.

The court states that it finds it highly unusual that the New Jersey court will not reissue certified Letters. Ms. Tseng confirms that she had been advised that Letters are only issued once in New Jersey. The court then advises Ms. Tseng that there may be notice issues and queries counsel if Elinore's heirs have received notice of the most recent filings. Ms. Tseng reports that the only notice provided to heirs was regarding the initial petition. The court then points counsel to the argument that the declarations filed are amendments, but the court is waiving notice as the amendments seem minor.

The Accounting petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.
